info.english_meaning: to play to gamble to dice to desire to win to transact to glow to shine to praise to please to boast to sleep to wish to go
info.hindI_arTa: KelanA jItane kI icCA karanA vyavahAra karanA tejasvI honA camakanA praSaMsA karanA stuti karanA prasanna honA yA karanA garva karanA so jAnA cAhanA jAnA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: vyavahAraH = krayavikrayAdiH  yaTAsamBavaM sakarmakatvAkarmakatve boDye  ' ardane devayet dIvyet krIqAdO  parikUjane  devayeta  idito dinvet  deverdeveta devane ' (Slo. 160-161) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'prAdevItpariGam' (Bawwi॰9.9)
'tftIyA ha pradyOriti' (aTarva॰18.2.48) prakfzwaPalopetA dyOH pradyOH
'imAM saBAmaDye yo vyadevId glahezu' (BA0 saBA0 715) ahArayat parAjayata
'vi devaM dIvyamAnA jAtyA Asate' (Sa0 brA0 1836) vidIvyamAnAH SfNgArakrIqAM kurvARAH
'nAdyUnAM tu striyaM gacCennAturAM na rajasvalAm' (vi0 pu0 311115) AdyUnA'prasannA anyatrAtrArTe paridyUna iti prayogamavataran dfzwaH AdyUnastvOdarikamAha
aDidevanam aDi upari dIvyate yatra cUtaPalakam
'uta prahAmatidIvyA jayAti' (f0 10429) atidIvya=uccEH propya
'tadvE vittaM mAtidevIH' (BA0 saBA0 5912) devanena mA parAjezWAH
'prARAnsatyajatAM yudDe prARadyUtABidevane' (BA0 Salya0 158) aBidevanam aBidevanaPalakaM yatrAkzErdIvyate
'SataM pratidIvyati sahasraM pratidIvyati Satasya pratidIvyati' (pA0 2359 sUtre vfttO) paRata ityarTaH pratiranarTakaH yo dIvyaterarTaH sa eva pratidIvyateH
'SalAkAM pratidIvyati' (pA0 2359 sUtre vfttO pratyudAharaRam) pratidIvyati prAtimuKyena kzipatItyarTaH
'yo asmAn pratidIvyati' (aTarva0 71094) pratikUlaM dyUtaM karotItyarTaH
'etadrAjanmama DanaM pratipARosti kastava yena mAM tvaM mahArAja Danena pratidIvyase' (BA0 saBA0 607).. pratidIvyase pratidIvyasi vijigIzase dyUtaM karozi (mayA samam)
'paridevanti karuRaM sarve mAnuzabudDayaH' (hari0 21231) pari devanti devayante paridevayante vilapanti
'KaradUzaRayorBrAtroH paryadevizwa sA puraH' (Bawwi0 434) paryadevizwa paryadevIt paryadIdivat vyalapIt
'mAM paSya madri mA putrO paridevISca devi mA' (avadA0 jA0 986) mA paridevIH=mA'nuSocIH
'ASaNkamAnA tatpApamAtmAnaM paryadevayat' (BA0 vana0 6530) ukto'rTaH
'paridevati tAn vIrAn DftarAzwro mahIpatiH' (BA0 vana0 2383)
'karuRaM paridevatIm' (BA0 u0 1781) paridevatIM paridevayamAnAm vilapantIm codayantIM punaH punar iti pAWAntaram
'aTa hAyaM paridyUna uvAca' (Sa0 brA0 11418) paridyUnaH KinnaH
'dfzwvA putraparidyUnaM kimakurvata mAmakAH' (BA0 droRa0 854) putra paridyUnaM putravaDasantaptam
'SokajASruparidyUnA' (rA0 2472) pariglAnA
'etadyonIni BUtAni tatra kA paridevanA' (BA0 SAM0 22417)
'paYcaBiH saMBftaH kAyo yadi paYcatvamAgataH karmaBiH svaSarIrasTEstatra kA paridevanA' (yAjYa0 39).. kimarTako vilApa ityarTaH
